<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

This is a Next.js (React + TypeScript) project for a dental clinic website. Prioritize clean, modern, and professional UI/UX. Use Tailwind CSS for styling. Reference https://dentio.co.in/ and https://dentique.co.in/ for content and inspiration. All components should be accessible and mobile-friendly.
